static probes are not complete behavioral proof
regression_risks: run_building_once now auto-emits terminal notifications, but write_single_building_evidence writes lifecycle and building-map only, not work/declared-building-plan.json. reporter._current_declared_projection requires declared plan evidence; when missing, current_work_kind/current_lane become empty and Slack falls back to 확인 필요. This leaves the single-step run surface at risk of not speaking the customer's language.

resume_building_plan does not expose report_env or report_slack_sender, and walker_resume delegates to _run_dynamic_graph_walker without those injection hooks. Resume may still use real os.environ defaults, but the required fake-env injected-sender proof is not available through the public resume API.

Explicit policies that include building_started can emit before recorded Building evidence exists: run_building_plan and _run_dynamic_graph_walker call the started notification immediately after preflight, before step evidence write. Default policy excludes building_started, so this is limited to explicit started policies.
remaining_delta: Add a run_building_once-specific label projection path or persist the declared plan packet for single-step runs, then pin the Slack text for that surface.
Thread report_env/report_slack_sender through resume_building_plan and walker_resume delegation, then add resume auto-wire proof.
Either keep building_started default-off and reject/ignore explicit pre-evidence start emission, or move started emission behind a recorded start evidence seam with a checker.
Re-run read_side_projection_boundary and --all in a writable-temp environment and demonstrate the required mutated FIRE cases.
